description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The stock is ergonomically shaped, featuring a smooth, polished wood grain and a slightly curved buttplate. The receiver and barrel assembly are metallic, with visible iron sights mounted at the front and rear. The trigger guard and magazine area are integrated into the lower receiver, with a bolt handle protruding from the right side. The rifle's overall design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th century military rifles, such as the Mauser Kar98k. The finish is utilitarian, with a matte sheen on the metal and a natural wood luster on the stock.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a polished wooden stock and a long blued steel barrel, featuring iron sights and a traditional military design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile and the front sight post.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the wooden stock, barrel, bolt handle, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the overall length of the rifle.
